stemHtml: A fuel jettisoning system must be installed on a two-engined aeroplane according to the Certification Specifications for Large Aeroplanes (CS-25) when it is shown that at the maximum take-off weight, less the actual or computed weight of fuel necessary for a 15-minute flight, the...

options.a: steady gradient of climb in the landing configuration with all-engines-operating is less than 3.2%.
options.b: steady gradient of climb in the approach configuration is less than 2.4%.
options.c: weight of the aeroplane is still above the maximum landing weight.
options.d: aeroplane is unable to maintain a positive climb gradient at 1500 feet above the aerodrome level.
